title: Sample Selection
description: Schema for audit sample selection records. Captures the seed, population, operator, and engine version for reproducible sampling.

seed.description: Random seed used for reproducible sample selection

population_query.description: Query or description defining the population from which samples are drawn

sample_size.description: Number of items selected in the sample

operator.description: User who initiated the sample selection

program_version.description: Version of the application that ran the sampling

sampling_engine_version.description: Version of the sampling engine algorithm

sampled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the sample was selected

selected_items.description: The actual sampled items (optional at selection time, populated after execution)

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA at the time of sampling for auditability

item_id.description: Identifier of the sampled item from the population

item_index.description: Zero-based index of the item in the population
